comments.author: @NovaTerrain-4K
comments.text: I am deeply impressed by the cinematic color grading and the atmospheric music in this video—it truly made me feel like 'time stopped moving.' Would you mind sharing the soundtrack playlist or the main camera/drone gear you used to capture these surreal shots?

comments.author: @PeterOey-t8t
comments.text:
I only hope that non-Europeans don't believe this utterly nonrealistic depiction of a fairytale version of Europe, which only exists in the mind of the maker.
Quite dillusional I'm  afraid.
Will spike sales of trips I guess....
Beautiful images though!
